field_values.action_summary: One unmanned, damaged gray vessel drifts erratically toward the city. The green Martians capture it, systematically strip it of all valuables (arms, silks, food, water), and set it ablaze, sending it away as a drifting funeral pyre. The protagonist watches with growing melancholy and empathy for the lost crew.
field_values.camera_intent: Wide shots of the drifting, burning ship; Medium shots of the systematic looting process; Close-ups of the protagonist's face reflecting empathy
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Intensity and color of fire on the vessel
Volume of debris and loot being moved from the craft
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH008_SC002

## Production Intent
Establish the ruthless efficiency of the Martian looters through a systematic stripping of a damaged vessel, transitioning from the tension of an approaching craft to the somber realization of loss.

## Required Cast
- protagonist
- green_martian_warriors
- woola

## Required Environments
- deserted_martian_city_plaza
- city outskirts

## Continuity Constraints
- Intensity and color of fire on the vessel
- Volume of debris/loot being moved from the craft

## Beat List
- BT001: Vessel approaches the city outskirts
- BT002: Systematic looting of the craft
- BT003: The vessel is set ablaze
- BT004: Protagonist observes the aftermath
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
